findings.summary: eligible set derives from active scopes only; intake-created tasks on unmerged branches are invisible until merged, which matches the offline boundary
queue section spawns a second specbridge process per dashboard generation; acceptable cost, could reuse in-process data later
schema_version is numeric 1 per operator spec while other registries use string 1; validator accepts presence not type

summary: Reviewed full diff: next-task is offline and read-only by construction (no gh calls, no writes; verified by dedicated test that compares git status before/after). Validator covers schema, enums, duplicates, empty reason and timestamps with three negative tests. Registry records issue 194 as not_planned with mandatory reason. Studio renders the queue from the same command (single source of truth). README states GitHub issues are storage, the decision registry is authoritative.
